results.title: Internet Famous
results.overview: Frank, a middle-aged family man, is convinced internet fame is his last shot at making his life mean something. When he promises his wife he'll go viral in a year, Frank's 365 days spent recklessly pursuing views and likes results in injuries, hospital bills, and chaos within the family. For Frank, success is only one viral video away — no matter the cost.

results.title: After the Bomb
results.overview: Interview with actor George Eastman on his involvement in Joe D'Amato's action movie "Endgame".

results.title: What Can You Hear?
results.overview: Grappling with a genetic hearing loss disorder, a young filmmaker seeks answers for how to cope with her inevitable deafness. To connect with her hearing-impaired family, she embarks on a road trip across the country with her grandma, mother, and sister in search of her great-grandmother’s memorial. Along the drive, the three generations explore their past, present, and future on the road to silence.  Directed by Molly Fox Director Molly Fox won Best Director for the film at the Stronger Than Fiction Film Festival, and the film was nominated for Best Documentary at the Texas Short Film Festival.

results.title: The Book of Veyngriya
results.overview: In a fractured medieval kingdom scarred by isolation and political decay, a young exile named Ulrich struggles to survive within the harsh wilderness beyond the realm that abandoned him. Far from the power and order of the citadel, his life changes after crossing paths with a wandering stranger who offers him shelter from the brutal landscape. As tensions rise within the kingdom itself, the divide between power and exile slowly begins to collapse. Grounded in realism and bleak medieval atmosphere, the film explores isolation, legacy and the shifting balance between authority and survival.

results.title: The Man Who Stumbled By His Words
results.overview: Famous author "Naif" isolates himself to write his new novel after struggling with writer's block, but he faces complex obstacles that keep him from even starting the first line.

results.title: Shadows of Desire
results.overview: A woman confronts her fears when she encounters a mysterious man who embodies her inner desires and anxieties. Between fear and longing, she embarks on a journey toward freedom, self-acceptance, and the courage to embrace her destiny.

results.title: blink-182 - Making of The Rock Show
results.original_title: blink-182 - Making of The Rock Show
results.overview: blink-182 - Making of The Rock Show

results.title: GEORGE
results.overview: Georgia, a jaded grocery store clerk in her 20s, moves through life with practiced indifference. As mounting dissatisfactions of her monotonous life come to a head, she’s forced to confront unresolved tensions under a self imposed countdown.

results.title: 2 Bro's Ideas
results.overview: With their Prod 2. due next week, Daniel and Logan can't decide on what to make. Daniel wants something classic and simple, while Logan wants . . . laptops to get stolen?

results.title: Ring 'A' Ling
results.overview: Tired of solicitors, Mormon's, ghouls, or nosey neighbors? Rest easy with the brand new Ring 'A' Ling! Only for $99.99

results.title: KUPAL
results.overview: After an exhausting day at school, starving college student Sam orders food delivery to his dorm and quickly spirals into obsession as the wait drags on. Bombarding the driver with frantic messages, desperate calls, and dramatic complaints about his hunger, Sam becomes increasingly unhinged when the driver responds with nothing more than a passive-aggressive thumbs-up emoji. What begins as a late-night craving soon turns into a tense and comedic clash between an impatient customer and a delivery driver pushed to his absolute limit.

results.title: Last Drop of Chocolate Milk
results.overview: 2 roommates get in a heated argument over who drank the last of the chocolate milk. Couldn't have been anyone else; only 2 of them live here.

results.title: Wagon-Man
results.overview: Inspired by the Florida man incident on September 26th, 2019, a young jogger mistakes a valued wagon for a piece of garbage; unknowing the other pairs of eyes on the wagon.

results.title: This is Not an Exit
results.overview: My short film I made for my Film Studies NEA (Unlisted on YouTube under the name This is Not an Exit - True Final Cut). Hitman in debt, kill people for money, but kill boyfriend which make him sad :(, he then go kill target and die :(  Dead because rats are scary  Sad because dead is sad :(

results.title: Footage we stumbled across
results.overview: A group of four friends had set out to party all night, but the night of the party one of them fell ill. The other three take to record the night so he doesn't miss out on the fun. But as the night goes on the air grows thinner. From the shadows a mysterious monster arises while the camara is still rolling. The footage was lost for years but on one cold winter day a man stumbled across it. In this found footage horror comedy parody you watch the horrifying event of what truly happened that night.
